zh.lifeSummary: Lady Elizabeth Maguire是Baron Baron Mcguire的女兒，於1432年出生。她於大約1452年與John Collett在英國英格蘭格盧斯特斯爾武坡 斯勞特聖 比特也斯 邱奇結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於大約1480年在英國英格蘭格盧斯特斯爾武坡 斯勞特享年49歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭格盧斯特斯爾武坡 斯勞特聖 比特也斯 邱奇。

nameMeanings.name: Maguire
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Irish Brendan, Liam, Siobhan, Brigid, Cathal, Ciaran, Connor, Conor, Eamonn, James Patrick, Niall, Seamus.
Irish: variant of   McGuire  . In Ireland this is the usual spelling.

variants.name: McGuire
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Irish Brendan, Brigid, Caitlin, Kieran, Aidan, Aislinn, Clancy, Conley, Connor, Cormac, Donal, Fionnuala.

Irish: Anglicized form of Gaelic Mag Uidhir ‘son of Odhar’, a byname meaning ‘sallow’. This was the name of the ruling family of Fermanagh from the 13th–17th centuries, now regularly Anglicized as Maguire .

nameMeanings.name: Elizabeth
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: The usual spelling of   Elisabeth   in English. It is recorded in the medieval period, but was made popular by being borne by  Queen Elizabeth I  of England (  1533–1603 ). In the 20th century it again became extremely fashionable, partly because it was the name of  Elizabeth Bowes-Lyon  (  1900–2002 ), who in  1936  became Queen Elizabeth as the wife of King George VI, and after his death in  1952  achieved great public affection as Queen Mother for nearly half a century. Even more influentially, it is the name of her daughter  Queen Elizabeth II  (  b. 1926 ).

variants.name: Elisabeth
meanings: The spelling of Elizabeth used in the Authorized Version of the New Testament, and in most modern European languages. This was the name of the mother of John the Baptist (Luke 1:60). Etymologically, the name means ‘God is my oath’, and is therefore identical with Elisheba, the name of the wife of Aaron according to the genealogy at Exodus 6:23. The final element seems to have been altered by association with Hebrew shabbāth ‘Sabbath’.

en.lifeSummary: Lady Elizabeth Maguire was born in 1432 as the daughter of Baron Baron Mcguire. She married John Collett about 1452, in St Peter's Church, Upper Slaughter, Gloucestershire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 1 daughter. She died about 1480, in Upper Slaughter, Gloucestershire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 49, and was buried in St Peter's Church, Upper Slaughter, Gloucestershire, England, United Kingdom.

ja.lifeSummary: Lady Elizabeth Maguireは1432年にBaron Baron Mcguireの娘として生まれた。約1452年にイギリスイギリスグロウセステルシュアイアウップエル スラウタースト ペテル'ス チャーチでJohn Collettと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼女は約1480年にイギリスイギリスグロウセステルシュアイアウップエル スラウターで49歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスグロウセステルシュアイアウップエル スラウタースト ペテル'ス チャーチにて埋葬された。

ko.Saint Peter's Church, Upper Slaughter, C: 영국 잉글랜드 그루스스터실르 업퍼 슬로그h터 스트 피터'스 c후르치
ko.lifeSummary: Lady Elizabeth Maguire(은)는 1432년 Baron Baron Mcguire의 딸로 태어났다. 그녀는 대략 1452년 영국 잉글랜드 그루스스터실르 업퍼 슬로그h터 스트 피터'스 c후르치에서 John Collett(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 대략 1480년 영국 잉글랜드 그루스스터실르 업퍼 슬로그h터에서 49세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 그루스스터실르 업퍼 슬로그h터 스트 피터'스 c후르치에 묻혔다.

ru.Saint Peter's Church, Upper Slaughter, C: ст питир'с чурч, уппир слотир, глоусестиршир, Англия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Lady Elizabeth Maguire родилась в 1432 г. Её отца звали Baron Baron Mcguire. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени John Collett около 1452 г. в местности ст питир'с чурч, уппир слотир, глоусестиршир, Англия, Великобритания. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 1 дочь. Она умерла около 1480 г. в местности уппир слотир, глоусестиршир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 49 лет и была похоронена в местности ст питир'с чурч, уппир слотир, глоусестиршир, Англия, Великобритания.
